# Test Data

This directory contains test fixtures for Stave's unit and E2E tests.

## Synthetic Data Disclaimer

All AWS account IDs, ARNs, bucket names, and asset identifiers in these fixtures are **synthetic placeholders**. They do not correspond to real AWS accounts or infrastructure.

Common synthetic values used:

| Value | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `123456789012` | Primary test AWS account ID |
| `777666555444` | Secondary test AWS account ID (cross-account tests) |
| `acme-*`, `test-*` | Synthetic bucket names |
| `AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE` | AWS official example access key ID |

No real credentials, account IDs, or infrastructure identifiers are stored in this directory.
